steps.title: Identify the similarity worth highlighting
steps.content: Both Uros House and The Mirror Connection are LED light sculptures created by Grimanesa Amoros — that's their key shared characteristic.

steps.title: Select the choice that emphasizes this shared trait
steps.content:
The sentence about Uros House and The Mirror Connection uses “as is” to establish a parallel structure between both pieces.

  • The version focused on only one artwork does not compare both pieces.
  • The version emphasizing their size difference does not establish the shared category.
  • The version that explicitly contrasts them works against the intended parallel.


That matches C.
